title: Just finished my WAD assignment!
body: Finally done with the Express + EJS project. MongoDB was tricky at first but once you understand collections and documents, it clicks. Anyone else struggling with Mongoose populate?
author: u001

title: Best bubble tea near SMU?
body: Looking for recommendations! I've tried LiHO and KOI but want something new. Bonus points if they have brown sugar boba.
author: u002

title: Tips for surviving finals week
body: 1. Start revision early (lol who actually does this). 2. Form study groups. 3. Don't pull all-nighters, sleep is important. 4. Past year papers are your best friend.
author: u003

title: Is Node.js still worth learning in 2026?
body: With all the new frameworks coming out, is it still worth investing time into Node.js and Express? Or should I jump straight into something like Bun or Deno?
author: u001
